title: Grappling Hooke
description: Springy! (Grappling hook but it behaves like a spring)
body:
[![Made for Modfest 26](https://github.com/cassiancc/Cassians-Badges/raw/refs/heads/main/cozy/ModFest-26.svg)](https://modfest.net/26)

Adds a grappling hook, but...

The hook added in this mod follows the physics of an idealised (linear elastic) spring, i.e. [Hooke's law](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hooke%27s_law) - instead of pulling you all the way to the hook, it attempts to pull you to (by default) 4 blocks away. For extra fun, the hook itself also follows these physics when it's not embedded in a block.

The mod also adds three enchantments;
- **Stiffness** (I-III) - increases the acceleration that the hook's spring applies
- **Resting Range** (I-III) - allows you to change the distance that the hook attempts to pull/push you to
  - (3-5 blocks for I, 2-6 for II, 1-7 for III)
- **Boosting** - launches you backwards slightly whenever you fire the hook

You can either sneak+scroll or fire+scroll to change the hook's resting distance in increments of 0.5 blocks, or 0.1 if both at once.

Also has optional [Area Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/area_lib) compatibility to disallow hook usage in areas with the `grapplinghooke:disallow` component.
